outages.boundary: S 7TH ST TO S 16TH ST AND E ROESER RD TO E VINEYARD RD
outages.comments: A transformer has failed. SRP crews are working to restore power.

outages.boundary: N 47TH AVE TO N 39TH AVE AND W ORANGEWOOD AVE TO W MARYLAND AVE
outages.comments: An SRP maintenance crew is performing critical maintenance work to repair or upgrade equipment. Power will be restored as quickly as possible.

outages.boundary: N MOUNTAIN RD TO N SAN MARCOS DR AND W MCDOWELL BLVD TO W APACHE TRL
outages.comments: We are investigating the cause of the outage.
